assertions.expectation: Explains the difference between Rapid and Stable channels — including that Rapid has no SLA for upgrade stability while Stable carries a full SLA, and clearly distinguishes minor version vs patch version differences between the channels
assertions.reason: The response mentions frequency differences (quarterly vs weekly) but doesn't explain SLA differences, upgrade stability guarantees, or distinguish between minor vs patch version handling between channels

assertions.expectation: Notes that channel changes don't trigger an immediate upgrade or downgrade
assertions.reason: The response incorrectly states 'The cluster will automatically update to the Stable channel's version' which implies an immediate version change upon channel switch

assertions.expectation: Warns that if 1.30 isn't yet available on Stable, the cluster may not receive patches until Stable catches up
assertions.reason: The response doesn't address the potential scenario where the current version isn't available on Stable and the implications for patch availability

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command to change the release channel
assertions.reason: Correctly provides the gcloud container clusters update command with --release-channel=stable flag

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking version availability on Stable before switching (gcloud container get-server-config)
assertions.reason: Includes the gcloud container get-server-config command in the pre-migration checklist to check what Stable channel offers

assertions.expectation: Discusses the impact on auto-upgrade timing going forward
assertions.reason: Mentions that future updates will be much slower (quarterly vs weekly) which addresses auto-upgrade timing changes

assertions.expectation: Mentions that the Extended channel is an option if they need even slower cadence (with cost implications)
assertions.reason: The response doesn't mention the Extended channel as an alternative option or discuss its cost implications

assertions.expectation: Advises coordinating the change during a maintenance window
assertions.reason: Explicitly recommends planning for a maintenance window and mentions expected downtime of 15-30 minutes
